Colombian footballer (born 1988)

César Arias

**César Augusto Arias Moros**[[a]](#cite_note-1) (born April 2, 1988), known as **César Arias**, is a Colombian [football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") striker who plays for [Alianza Petrolera](/wiki/Alianza_Petrolera_F.C. "Alianza Petrolera F.C.").

## Club career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=C%C3%A9sar_Arias&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Club career")]

César Arias began his career with Asociación Deportiva Belén before joining [Alianza Petrolera](/wiki/Alianza_Petrolera "Alianza Petrolera") in 2006. Arias was slowly integrated into the first team with Alianza but by 2008 became an integral member of the squad, and was one of the top scorers for the club in the Copa Premier II de Fútbol de Ascenso.[[1]](#cite_note-2)

With Alianza Petrolera, Arias faced [Cúcuta](/wiki/Corporaci%C3%B3n_Nuevo_C%C3%BAcuta_Deportivo "Corporación Nuevo Cúcuta Deportivo") in a [Copa Colombia 2008](/wiki/Copa_Colombia_2008 "Copa Colombia 2008") match and impressed directors of [Cúcuta](/wiki/Corporaci%C3%B3n_Nuevo_C%C3%BAcuta_Deportivo "Corporación Nuevo Cúcuta Deportivo") who promptly signed him. He made his debut for [Cúcuta](/wiki/Corporaci%C3%B3n_Nuevo_C%C3%BAcuta_Deportivo "Corporación Nuevo Cúcuta Deportivo") during the 2009 season.[[2]](#cite_note-3) In his first season with Cúcuta he appeared in 36 league matches and scored 6 goals, playing primarily as an attacking midfielder.

## International career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=C%C3%A9sar_Arias&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: International career")]

After impressing with Cúcuta Arias was called up by [Colombia](/wiki/Colombia_national_football_team "Colombia national football team") in August 2010.[[3]](#cite_note-4) He made his international debut for Colombia on August 11, 2010 in a 1-1 draw with [Bolivia](/wiki/Bolivia_national_football_team "Bolivia national football team") played at [La Paz](/wiki/La_Paz "La Paz").

## Notes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=C%C3%A9sar_Arias&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Notes")]

1. **[^](#cite_ref-1)** In this [Spanish name](/wiki/Spanish_name "Spanish name"), the first or paternal [surname](/wiki/Surname "Surname") is  *Arias* and the second or maternal family name is  *Moros*.
